items.label: Switch GraphQL Codegen to client-preset with Inline Operations
Keycloak OIDC + next-auth v5 for Authentication
Custom Login/Register Pages with ROPC + Keycloak Admin API
Gateway-Owned Domain Logic with External Edge Orchestration

architecture/argocd.title: ArgoCD — GitOps Continuous Delivery
architecture/argocd.description: Pull-based GitOps continuous delivery using ArgoCD for LuckyPlans.

architecture/ci-cd-pipeline.title: CI/CD Pipeline
architecture/ci-cd-pipeline.description: Automated pipeline using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD for the LuckyPlans monorepo.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-10-functi.title: Functional Decomposition over Domain-Driven Services
architecture/decisions/2026-03-10-functi.description: Chose functional decomposition (service-core for all CRUD) over domain-per-service DDD.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-10-graphq.title: GraphQL Code-First via API Gateway
architecture/decisions/2026-03-10-graphq.description: Chose GraphQL code-first with NestJS decorators over REST or schema-first GraphQL.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-10-redis-.title: Redis Pub/Sub for Inter-Service Communication
architecture/decisions/2026-03-10-redis-.description: Chose Redis pub/sub via NestJS Transport.REDIS over HTTP, gRPC, or full message brokers.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-11-graphq.title: Switch GraphQL Codegen to client-preset with Inline Operations
architecture/decisions/2026-03-11-graphq.description: Replaced three separate codegen plugins and .graphql files with client-preset and inline graphql() calls.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-11-keyclo.title: Keycloak OIDC + next-auth v5 for Authentication
architecture/decisions/2026-03-11-keyclo.description: Adopt Keycloak as the IdP with Authorization Code Flow + PKCE via next-auth v5; validate tokens in the API Gateway using JWKS.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-11-nextra.title: Nextra v4 Integrated at /docs Route
architecture/decisions/2026-03-11-nextra.description: Integrated Nextra v4 (without nextra-theme-docs) at the /docs route inside apps/web.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-12-custom.title: Custom Login/Register Pages with ROPC + Keycloak Admin API
architecture/decisions/2026-03-12-custom.description: Replace Keycloak UI redirects and nginx proxy with custom Next.js auth pages, gateway ROPC login, Admin API registration, and Next.js rewrites.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-12-gatewa.title: Gateway-Managed Sessions (replacing next-auth)
architecture/decisions/2026-03-12-gatewa.description: Move OAuth token management from the Next.js frontend into the API Gateway with Redis-backed server-side sessions.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-13-bitnam.title: Bitnami Sealed Secrets for Production
architecture/decisions/2026-03-13-bitnam.description: Use Bitnami Sealed Secrets to manage production secrets safely in Git.

architecture/decisions/2026-03-16-prisma.title: PostgreSQL Persistence with Prisma ORM
architecture/decisions/2026-03-16-prisma.description: Add PostgreSQL as the application database via Prisma ORM in a dedicated packages/prisma package

architecture/decisions/2026-05-21-gatewa.title: Gateway-Owned Domain Logic with External Edge Orchestration
architecture/decisions/2026-05-21-gatewa.description: Current architecture keeps client-facing domain logic in api-gateway and uses external edge runtimes for distributed execution.

architecture/decisions/2026-06-05-defer-.title: Defer Edge WebSocket Sessions
architecture/decisions/2026-06-05-defer-.description: Current edge orchestration remains on authenticated internal REST polling and connectivity heartbeats; persistent WebSocket sessions are deferred until low-latency command needs justify them.

architecture/decisions/2026-06-05-defer-.title: Defer Generic Task Artifact Transfer
architecture/decisions/2026-06-05-defer-.description: Current edge task payloads and results remain on internal REST JSON endpoints; object-storage artifact transfer is deferred until task data grows beyond that contract.

architecture/decisions/2026-06-25-standa.title: Standalone Docs App on docs.luckyplans.xyz
architecture/decisions/2026-06-25-standa.description: Split the public docs and blog out of apps/web into a dedicated Docusaurus deployment.

architecture/helm-deployment.title: Helm Deployment Architecture
architecture/helm-deployment.description: Single Helm chart design, service configuration, and deployment commands.

architecture/overview.title: System Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: Current system architecture, service map, data flow, and infrastructure overview.

architecture/tls-certificates.title: TLS Certificates — cert-manager + Let's Encrypt
architecture/tls-certificates.description: Automatic TLS provisioning and renewal using cert-manager with Let's Encrypt ACME HTTP-01.

guides/deployment.title: Deployment Guide
guides/deployment.description: Deploy LuckyPlans to local k3d or production Kubernetes with ArgoCD GitOps.

guides/developer.title: Developer Guide
guides/developer.description: How to set up and run LuckyPlans locally for development.

index.title: LuckyPlans Documentation
index.description: Architecture, guides, and reference documentation for the LuckyPlans platform.

system/api.title: API Reference
system/api.description: GraphQL endpoint, authentication, REST auth endpoints, message patterns, and response formats.

system/configuration.title: Configuration Reference
system/configuration.description: Environment variables, Helm values, and production overrides.
